questions.question: What are the potential consequences of a data protection policy that compromises user privacy, as discussed in Chapter 8? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the implications of a data protection policy on individuals and society

questions.question: How might the lack of transparency in AI decision-making processes, as described in Chapter 8, impact public trust in AI systems? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Think about the role of transparency in building trust and accountability

questions.question: What are some potential risks associated with the deployment of AI systems that perpetuate and amplify existing social biases, as discussed in Chapter 8? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the potential consequences of biased AI systems on marginalized groups
